# {{CLIENT_NAME}} Brand Repository

> Authoritative brand, business, and design-token documentation for
> {{CLIENT_NAME}}. Maintained by Direct Launch. Read AGENTS.md for usage rules.

## Core
- [AGENTS.md](./AGENTS.md): How agents should use this repository. Read first.
- [brand.json](./brand.json): Design tokens (W3C DTCG). Colour, type, spacing, radii. Usage rules live in each token's $description.
- [brand.config.json](./brand.config.json): Which folders are published to the public site.

## Business
- [business/overview.md](./business/overview.md): What the business sells, to whom, and how it makes money.
- [business/audience.md](./business/audience.md): Customer segments, motivations, objections.
- [business/competitors.md](./business/competitors.md): Competitive set and differentiation. Internal.
- [business/glossary.md](./business/glossary.md): Approved and forbidden terminology.

## Identity
- [identity/attributes.md](./identity/attributes.md): Brand pillars and personality.
- [identity/voice-and-tone.md](./identity/voice-and-tone.md): How the brand speaks, with do/don't pairs.
- [identity/messaging.md](./identity/messaging.md): Positioning statement, boilerplate, taglines, proof points.
- [identity/naming.md](./identity/naming.md): Product and service naming conventions.

## Foundations
- [foundations/logo.md](./foundations/logo.md): Logo variants, clear space, misuse.
- [foundations/colour.md](./foundations/colour.md): Palette roles, ratios, approved pairings.
- [foundations/typography.md](./foundations/typography.md): Typefaces, scale, weights.
- [foundations/imagery.md](./foundations/imagery.md): Photography and illustration direction.
- [foundations/accessibility.md](./foundations/accessibility.md): Contrast, motion, and copy requirements.

## Web
- [web/components.md](./web/components.md): How brand rules map to UI patterns.
- [web/seo.md](./web/seo.md): Target keywords, meta patterns, structured data.

## Legal
- [legal/licences.md](./legal/licences.md): Font and photography licences with expiry dates. Internal.
